emails.theme: NEW: 4mm Ice Chain 14k Gold (Two Tone) + Signature & Kings Clasps
emails.shortDescription: New product launch. Two tone design creates the illusion of a diamond paved chain. Also feature Signature Clasps and Kings Clasps as an add-on.
emails.notes: First email of the month. Brand new product launch. Product page has strong imagery. Mention adding a signature clasp to your chain.
emails.creativeDirection: New launch. Two tone design, illusion of diamond paved chain. Feature the chain solo, then show pairing with Signature Clasp and Kings Clasp. Product page has strong imagery.

emails.product: Chain Breaker Collection (Apex Wolf, Mortis Skull, Regis Lion, Koda Bear, Rajah Tiger)

emails.creativeDirection: Bold animal spirits shattering their chains. Showcase all 5 animals. Silver and Gold. Each pendant features gemstone or diamond eyes and lab grown diamond borders (gold).

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: For Every Kind of Dad
emails.shortDescription: Personality based gifting guide. The Adventure Dad (Voyager), The Bold Dad (Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker), The Faith Dad (Champion/Redemption/Cross), The Legacy Dad (Memento Mori/Stoic).
emails.notes: Creative, fun angle. Different from standard product showcase. Should feel like a gift guide.
emails.creativeDirection: Personality based gifting. Adventure Dad = Voyager. Bold Dad = Tiger/Lion/Chain Breaker. Faith Dad = Champion/Cross. Legacy Dad = Memento Mori/Stoic. Each dad type gets 1 to 2 product picks.

emails.theme: FATHER'S DAY: Last Call Shipping Deadline + Best Sellers
emails.product: CHAMPION Saint Michael, 5mm Gold Franco, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Compass, 3.5mm Gold Franco USA
emails.shortDescription: June 15 is the LAST day to order for Father's Day delivery. Spotlight the five best selling pieces (no platinum focus): CHAMPION Gold Saint Michael, 5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Gold Compass, 3.5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold USA Made.
emails.notes: Shipping deadline urgency + best sellers (client changed focus from platinum to best sellers on Jun 15).
emails.creativeDirection: Shipping deadline urgency. Order today for guaranteed delivery. Feature five client-specified best sellers: CHAMPION Gold Saint Michael (featured), 5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold, 5mm Silver Franco, Voyager Gold Compass, 3.5mm Diamond Cut Franco 14k Gold USA Made. Nick founder voice, Shop Now CTAs, no pricing, no platinum messaging.
